title: CL-1002 — Motor claim, low-speed rear-end collision at signalised intersection
content: Customer: Daniel Okafor, 2022 Toyota RAV4 Cruiser, registration 1BX-3KQ. Third-party vehicle: 2018 Mazda CX-5, single occupant, no injuries reported. Incident: rear-ended while stationary at a red light on Whitehorse Rd, Box Hill, 2026-05-02 at 17:55. Police report number VIC-PR-447821 lodged at the scene. Customer's vehicle damage: rear bumper, tailgate skin, parking sensors, suspected cracked tow-bar. Estimated repair cost: $6,400 — within the $10,000 fast-track threshold for Zava preferred-repairer network. Liability: 100% third-party at fault per police report and dash-cam footage uploaded by the customer (file dashcam-2026-05-02-1755.mp4). Hire car authorised under Cruiser policy add-on for up to 21 days. Next step: Supplier Coordination to assign Box Hill Smash Repairs.
